summary.lv: Hibrīda programmatūras inženiera loma Hewlett Packard Enterprise, izstrādājot un atkļūdojot programmatūru HPE edge-to-cloud produktiem; aptuveni divas dienas nedēļā HPE birojā.
summary.en: Hybrid software engineering role at Hewlett Packard Enterprise, designing, developing, and debugging software across HPE's edge-to-cloud products, with about two days a week in an HPE office.
